review_text:
Saat itu kesini karena tugas kuliah
Jadi desa adat osing ini memiliki banyak keunikan salah satunya dari masyarakatnya yang masih menjunjung tinggi adat istiadatnya. Mereka juga adalah suku asli yang ada di Banyuwangi. Saat datang kesana saya disuguhkan teh manis dan cemilan daerah sana (saya lupa namanya apa) dan masyarakat adat disana sangat ramah kepada kami. Sayangnya, saat itu kami belum mencicipi hidangan asli sana yaitu pecel pithik osing. Buat kalian yang ingin kesana, saya saranin nyoba deh!

review_text:
I came here in 2014 year ago with my friends to see festival ngopi sepuluh ewu, i try some unique coffee for free, why unique? because Banyuwangi coffee robusta mixed with herb and spices ingredients make it very bold and strong coffee and people called it " Kopi Jaran goyang" ,and this coffee believed as aphrodiasics, in this festival we can see many food tenant booths and original Banyuwangi hand gifts, so i don't forget to buy t-shirt festival ngopi sepuluh ewu, nice people with kindness, we can see traditional cultural Banyuwangi barong dance as cultural dance heritage too.

PS: i edited my photo to make unique effect, because my real photo file is gone/lost.
